Name: MOD-Home-HomeDashboard-Functional: Verify Privacy Policy link at the bottom of the Home page navigates to the privacy policy page
Precondition: User is logged in as System Admin on the Home page.
Objective: To verify the 'Privacy Policy' link in the main content area navigates to https://www.boardeffect.com/privacy-policy.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email in the 'Email' field

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the Home page.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Privacy Policy' link at the bottom of the main content area
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Privacy Policy" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is navigated to https://www.boardeffect.com/privacy-policy. The BoardEffect privacy policy page is displayed (may open in a new tab).
